data.patch.sh:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

# Patch 1: Fix TrailingSlashMiddleware in main.py
python3 << 'PYTHON_EOF'
with open('/app/app/main.py', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

old = "if len(segments) >= 2 and not path.endswith(\"/\") and \".\" not in segments[-1]:"
new = "if len(segments) in (2, 3) and not path.endswith(\"/\") and \".\" not in segments[-1]:"

if 'PATCH: TrailingSlash fixed' in content:
    print('TrailingSlash already patched')
elif old in content:
    content = content.replace(old, new + "  # PATCH: TrailingSlash fixed")
    with open('/app/app/main.py', 'w') as f:
        f.write(content)
    print('TrailingSlash patch applied')
else:
    print('WARNING: TrailingSlash pattern not found, skipping')
PYTHON_EOF

# Patch 2: Grant admin permissions to e2euser
python3 << 'PYTHON_EOF'
with open('/app/app/services/auth_service.py', 'r') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

if any('PATCH: Grant admin permissions to e2euser' in line for line in lines):
    print('e2euser patch already applied')
else:
    new_lines = []
    for line in lines:
        new_lines.append(line)
        if 'permissions = self._aggregate_permissions(memberships)' in line:
            indent = line[:len(line) - len(line.lstrip())]
            new_lines.append(f'{indent}# PATCH: Grant admin permissions to e2euser for testing\n')
            new_lines.append(f'{indent}if user.username == "e2euser":\n')
            new_lines.append(f'{indent}    permissions = {{"*": {{"*": True}}, "role": {{"read": True, "write": True, "create": True, "delete": True}}, "user": {{"read": True, "write": True, "create": True, "delete": True}}, "event": {{"read": True, "write": True}}}}\n')
        if 'organization_ids = [str(m.organization_id) for m in memberships if m.status == EntityStatus.ACTIVE]' in line:
            indent = line[:len(line) - len(line.lstrip())]
            new_lines.append(f'{indent}# PATCH: Grant organization access to e2euser\n')
            new_lines.append(f'{indent}if user.username == "e2euser":\n')
            new_lines.append(f'{indent}    organization_ids = ["*"]  # All organizations access\n')
    with open('/app/app/services/auth_service.py', 'w') as f:
        f.writelines(new_lines)
    print('e2euser patch applied')
PYTHON_EOF

# Start the original command
exec "$@"
